zh.lifeSummary: Richard Barstowe是Barstowe的兒子，於1520年出生在英國越可爾諾萊安。他於1547年6月13日與Margaret Oldfield在英國越可爾奧文登結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1565年10月8日在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在英國越可爾諾萊安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Barstowe是Barstowe的儿子，于1520年出生在英国越可爾諾萊安。他于1547年6月13日与Margaret Oldfield在英国越可爾奧文登结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1565年10月8日在他的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在英国越可爾諾萊安。

nameMeanings.name: Barstowe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from a lost place called Bairstow in Southowram, Yorkshire, probably named with Old English beger ‘berry’ + stōw ‘place’. The surname is still most common in Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Barstowe was born in 1520, in Northowram, Yorkshire, England as the son of Barstowe. He married Margaret Oldfield on 13 June 1547, in Ovenden, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 8 October 1565, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Northowram, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Barstowe est né en 1520, à Northowram, Everwyck, Angleterre, fils de Barstowe. Il a épousé Margaret Oldfield le 13 juin 1547, à Ovenden, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1565, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Northowram, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Barstowe wurde 1520 in Northowram, Yorkshire, England, als Sohn von Barstowe geboren. Er hat am 13. Juni 1547 in Ovenden, Yorkshire, England Margaret Oldfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Oktober 1565 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Northowram, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Barstowe è nato il nel 1520 nel Northowram, Yorkshire, England come figlio di Barstowe. Lui sposato Margaret Oldfield il 13 giugno 1547, nel Ovenden, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 8 ottobre 1565, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Northowram, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Northowram, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアノーソウラム
ja.Ovenden, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアオベンデン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Barstoweは1520年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノーソウラムでBarstoweの息子として生まれた。1547年6月13日にイギリスヨークシュアイアオベンデンでMargaret Oldfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1565年10月8日に故郷で45歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアノーソウラムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Barstowe(은)는 1520년 영국 요르크실르 노르토램에서 Barstowe의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1547년 6월 13일 영국 요르크실르 븐든에서 Margaret Oldfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1565년 10월 8일 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 노르토램에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Barstowe nasceu em 1520, em Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filho de Barstowe. Ele casou-se com Margaret Oldfield em 13 de junho de 1547, em Ovenden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1565, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Barstowe родился в 1520 г. в местности нортоурам, еркшир, Англия. Его отца звали Barstowe. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Oldfield 13 июня 1547 г. в местности овенден, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 8 октября 1565 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности нортоурам, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Barstowe nació en 1520, en Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Barstowe. Se casó con Margaret Oldfield el 13 de junio de 1547, en Ovenden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1565, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
